title: Proxmox Homelab Cluster
summary: 3-node Proxmox cluster running Ceph storage, Docker workloads, and a pile of self-hosted services.
details: Notes, diagrams, and write-ups about this project go here. You can write in plain HTML/Markdown-ish text in this field, or convert these to .md files later if you want richer formatting.
